metadata.title: Novel word count
metadata.description: Displays a word count (and more!) for each file, folder and vault in the File Explorer pane.

regex.source: .setDesc("MomentJS date format to use for date strings")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于日期字符串的 MomentJS 日期格式")

regex.source: .setDesc("Log debugging information to the developer console")
regex.target: .setDesc("将调试信息记录到开发者控制台")
.setDesc("[跟踪会话] 会话计数类型")
name: "要显示的第一个数据类型"
name: "要显示的第二个数据类型"
name: "要显示的第三个数据类型"
name: "重新计算所有笔记 / 重置会话"
name: "显示下一个数据类型（第一位置）"

regex.source: text: "You can display up to three data types side by side."
regex.target: text: "您可以并排显示多达三种数据类型。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Increase this value to make all count labels in the File Explorer more visible.")
regex.target: .setDesc("增加此值可使文件浏览器中的所有计数标签更明显。")

regex.source: Total pages, precise to 2 digits after the decimal.
regex.target: 页数，精确到小数点后两位。

regex.source: Estimated time to read the note.
regex.target: 预计阅读笔记所需时间。

regex.source: Set a word goal by adding the 'word-goal' property to a note.
regex.target: 通过向笔记添加 'word-goal' 属性来设置目标字数。

regex.source: Total characters (letters, symbols, numbers, and spaces).
regex.target: 字符总数（字母、符号、数字和空格）。
指向其他笔记的链接总数。

regex.source: Total embedded images, files, and notes.
regex.target: 嵌入的图片、文件和笔记总数。

regex.source: The first alias property of each note.
regex.target: 每条笔记的首个别名属性。

regex.source: Creation date. (On folders: earliest creation date of any note.)
regex.target: 创建日期。（对于文件夹：任何笔记的最早创建日期。）

regex.source: Date of last edit. (On folders: latest edit date of any note.)
regex.target: 最后编辑日期。（对于文件夹：任何笔记的最新编辑日期。）

regex.source: Track progress since last Obsidian startup, plugin init, settings change, or recount
regex.target: 跟踪自上次 Obsidian 启动、插件初始化、设置更改或重新计数以来的进度

regex.source: Increase this value to make all count labels in the File Explorer more visible.
regex.target: 增加此值可使文件浏览器中的所有计数标签更明显。

regex.source: Only count paths matching the indicated term(s). Case-sensitive, comma-separated. Defaults to all files. Any term starting with ! will be excluded instead of included.
regex.target: 仅计算匹配指定术语的路径。区分大小写，逗号分隔。默认为所有文件。任何以 '!' 开头的术语将被排除而不是包含。

regex.source: Exclude %%Obsidian%% and <!--HTML--> comments from counts. May affect performance on large vaults.
regex.target: 从计数中排除 %%Obsidian%% 和 <!--HTML--> 注释。可能会影响大型库的性能。

regex.source: Exclude ```code blocks``` (e.g. DataView snippets) from all counts. May affect performance on large vaults.
regex.target: 从所有计数中排除 ```代码块```（例如 DataView 代码片段）。可能会影响大型库的性能。

regex.source: For external links, exclude the URI from all counts. For internal links with aliases, only count the alias. May affect performance on large vaults.
regex.target: 对于外部链接，从所有计数中排除 URI。对于带有别名的内部链接，仅计算别名。可能会影响大型库的性能。

regex.source: Exclude footnotes[^1] from counts. May affect performance on large vaults.
regex.target: 从计数中排除脚注[^1]。可能会影响大型库的性能。

regex.source: Used to calculate Reading Time. 265 is the average speed of an English-speaking adult.
regex.target: 用于计算阅读时间。265 是英语母语成人的平均阅读速度。

regex.source: Used to calculate Reading Time. 500 is the average speed for CJK texts.
regex.target: 用于计算阅读时间。500 是中日韩文本的平均阅读速度。

regex.source: Used for page count. 300 is standard in English language publishing.
regex.target: 用于页面计数。300 是英语出版物的标准。

regex.source: Used for page count. This is common in Danish.
regex.target: 用于页面计数。丹麦语通常是 2400。

regex.source: Used for page count. This is common in German (Normseite).
regex.target: 用于页面计数。德语通常是 1500 (Normseite)。

regex.source: MomentJS date format to use for date strings
regex.target: 用于日期字符串的 MomentJS 日期格式

regex.source: Log debugging information to the developer console
regex.target: 将调试信息记录到开发者控制台

regex.source: If changes have occurred outside of Obsidian, you may need to trigger a manual recount
regex.target: 如果 Obsidian 外部发生了更改，您可能需要触发手动重新计数
[跟踪会话] 会话计数类型

regex.source: Show data inline with file/folder names, right-aligned, or underneath
regex.target: 将数据显示在文件名/文件夹名旁边，右对齐或下方显示
文件夹：与笔记相同的数据
根目录：与笔记相同的数据
无法格式化 ': '： `[${COUNT_TYPE_DISPLAY_STRINGS[config.countType]}] 无法格式化 ': '`

regex.source: Cannot format 'No value provided': `[${COUNT_TYPE_DISPLAY_STRINGS[config.countType]}] Cannot format 'No value provided'`
regex.target: 无法格式化 '未提供值'： `[${COUNT_TYPE_DISPLAY_STRINGS[config.countType]}] 无法格式化 '未提供值'`

regex.source: Could not find file explorer leaf.
regex.target: 未能找到文件浏览器窗格。

regex.source: File explorer leaf not found; skipping update.
regex.target: 未找到文件浏览器窗格；跳过更新。

regex.source: No cached data found; skipping update.
regex.target: 未找到缓存数据；跳过更新。

regex.source: Setting display counts for ALL fileItems
regex.target: 为所有文件项设置显示计数

regex.source: container already touched, skipping display update
regex.target: 容器已触摸，跳过显示更新
容器干净，正在更新显示

regex.source: metadataCache hook fired, scheduling file for analysis
regex.target: metadataCache 钩子已触发，正在调度文件进行分析
vault 钩子已触发，正在分析文件

regex.source: vault hook fired, scheduling file for analysis
regex.target: vault 钩子已触发，正在调度文件进行分析
vault 钩子已触发，正在忽略文件
vault 钩子已触发，正在重新计数文件
[循环下一个数据类型] 命令已触发
[切换缩写 - 笔记] 命令已触发
[设置为 ... 计数类型] 命令已触发
